feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sales order creation
entry.content:
i, our client wants to have prerequisite at the time of sales order creation where certain customers are allowed to create sales orders with order quantity in multiple of half/full pallets only. This check should be active only for certain customer and not all customers. 

Ex - Product XYZ has base unit of PC and sales unit of PAL where 1 PAL = 24 PC.

If a customer sends in an EDI order for 15 PC, the EDI message should error out and a failure notification should be sent to a business user whereas, if the same customer sends in an EDI order for 48 PC, system should allow sales order creation as 48 is a multiple of 24 (2 x 24 = 48). 

 

Is there a solution available in SAP S4 Public Cloud to fulfil this requirement?

entry.title: Create Button not working in Manage Sales order Version 2 F3893 application
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

The create button givne in the new app F3893 for the version 2023 is not working. It is not giving any error but nothing happens when we click on the Create link.

Also when we select any record from the table and then click on Create, it is calling the CreatewithorderType after create it is giving error "Resource not found for segment 'com.sap.gateway.srvd.c_salesordermanage_sd.v0001.CreateWithSalesOrderType'"

Can any one help us here?

Thanks

Sarita

entry.title: is checking at line item level in S4HANA tcode VA05 is new feature?
entry.content:
is checking at line item level in S4HANA tcode VA05 is new feature?
appreciate if someone can guide me on which SAP notes / documentation that explains this improved features?
it wasnt the case in ECC.

p/s: i've tried scouring for SAP Notes but none relevant to what i am looking for

Thanks!
Azizul

entry.title: Single Invoice per Payer and different Sold to
entry.content:
Hi all,

My business requirement is to have the possibility to create a single invoice with the same Payer and different Sold-To party without an invoice list.

I need only the possibility, it means that when users required create a single invoice, is not a must.

Any idea?

Please suggest me any solutions!

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Data Migration Cockpit Clarification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have created few custom fields for a customer's (Key User Extensibility Fields). We are in the stage of migrating their legacy system data into SAP.

There is a data migration template called (Source data for Customer - extend existing record by new org levels) where it has the custom fields I have created in the system. But whatever the value I put in the template and migration is also getting successful, but somehow couldn't see the value getting reflected on the customer master data records.

Please advise what could be wrong in here.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Please refer to the below screenshot

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Create Button not working in Manage Sales order Version 2 F3893 application
entry.content:
we have SAP S/4 HANA 2023 version, and in the new Manange Sales order V2 app, the create button link is not working.

Nothing happens when we click on it, nothing in the error log, no console or network error.

It is not calling any odata service.

Can anyone help us here ?

Thanks

entry.title: Sales order in progress should be close
entry.content:
Hi all

I have an issue with a sales order. In this order we have an item with 4 quantity but only 3 has been confirmed and delivered. The problem is that in the related production order we have 4 quantity which was delivered for this order. So now we have an open quantity of 1 for this sales order which we can retrieve in MD04. 

It is not possible to modify manually the quantity or set a rejection reason because of the production order which is close and not modifiable. It's also not possible to create a delivery for this item because there is no schedule line for it.

Does someone have a solution for this issue ? May set the status as completed but I didn't find a way to do so.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Source of material sales text in sales order.
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

I am not able to find out the source of material sales text in my sales order. There is no sales text maintained in MM03 or in customer material info record. If i click on log it says text could not be obtained but there is text available. As the order is created by idoc, i checked idoc segments but i could not find text being sent in any of the segments. When i created similar order manually and saved it, no text was determined. I have checked with Business and they mentioned that they are not entering it manually. Any idea what could be the source.

entry.title: Need to send E-Mail for the same partner.
entry.content:
Hello Experts;

 

Need your help with this requirement; we have created an output that will trigger an E-Mail to the Ship-to Party of the deliveries we added into that shipment.

In test environment I created 5 Deliveries from 5 Individual sales orders (3 With different Ship-to partners and 2 with same Ship-to party created on purpose).

The E-mail’s body says “Dear (Ship-to name); we are generating (Shipment number) for your (Sales Order number)”

Upon creating the Shipment, only 4 outputs are determined since there are 4 Ship-to parties and as per SAP’s std. design we cannot have 2 outputs for the same partner.

 

Ship-to #1 --> SO# 2601 --> Delivery# 80001987 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #2 --> SO# 2602 --> Delivery# 80001988 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #3 --> SO# 2603 --> Delivery# 80001989 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #4 --> SO# 2604 --> Delivery# 80001990 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #4 --> SO# 2605 --> Delivery# 80001991 --> Output DOES NOT get determined, Since the Output already exist for this Ship-to.

 

In this case we still need to have a fifth E-Mail sent to Ship-to #4 since this customer has 2 different Sales Orders (2604 & 2605) being shipped in the same shipment; Would it be possible achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Hi Experts,I have business scenario to map Software sales with license in SAP Sales and Distribution
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

Can any one share the best practises to in SAP to map Software licenses sales using SAP sales and distribution.

Like what should be material type, item category group & item category ? We don't want these to be delivery relevant .

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Customer with multiple distribution channels
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I m working on a Customer payment performance report in which a customer is assigned multiple distribution channels. In the report, the functional consultants have fixed the distribution channels '02' '07' and '10'. So in my select query, I have filtered the customers by distribution channels '02', '07' and '10'. Now as per the consultants requirement, customers having distribution channels '03' and '10' should not be displayed. But since distribution channel - '10' is included in select query, this customer is also displayed. Please see screenshot below. So how can the customer with distribution channel '03' and '10' be excluded?

entry.title: Requirement 77 (CCS: Accr from Settl) assigned to the Condition type REA5
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In the Standard Pricing procedure for Settlement A10005 (Rebates - Germany), Requirement 77 (CCS: Accr from Settl) is assigned to the REA5 condition type. However, in the pricing procedure A17005 (Rebates US), it is not assigned to the condition type REA5. Therefore, I would like to understand the functionality or purpose of the routine 77 assigned to REA5. If it's not assigned, what are the implications?

Please advise.

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Sometime cost is posted against 601 movement type and sometimes not.
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We have scenario where we create sales order then a delivery and GI is done against delivery.
meanwhile this item is produced via Production order and after 101 ( keeping it in own unrestricted stocK) we do goods issue to customer with 601 movement type. 

but weird part is sometimes it is having value as 0 and sometimes it has some value . Can someone help what is driving this value at the time of GI against delivery ?
Attached screenshot with 2 case. where material 1 and material 2 are exactly same in terms of master data ( same material type, same valuation class etc.) for one case we have some value while for other case its 0. 

Any clue to investigate in particular direction will be helpful. Thanks.

-BR 
Saurabh

entry.title: Commodity code + country of origin + region of origin on the invoice form for order-related invoices
entry.content:
Dear community,

We have the problem in the sales order processing process with 100% customer down payment that the commodity code + country of origin + region of origin of the articles are not printed on the invoice form in the final invoice. We have activated the data for printing in the form itself.
As far as we know, in the “new” International Trade, the “foreign trade data” is mainly transferred from the outbound delivery to the invoice.
According to our external consultants, however, an order-related billing document is required for the process, which means that we cannot reference the copy control to the outbound delivery. We have also tried to redetermine the foreign trade data in the copy control from sales document to billing document via the customizing field “Determine foreign trade”. However, without success.

Now the question to the community. Does anyone also know this problem and possibly know a solution?

System
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2020 06 (05/2023)

Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: Send discount price ( SD price ) to third party system
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

I have a requirement to send discounted prices ( therefore condition records in their validity date ) to a third party system ( WMS in my case ) alongside material master data. For MM, since we're in retail, we'll be sending ARTMAS message type but I couldn't find if there is a standard field/ or another Idoc to send price conditions. Do you have any ideas?

Thank you in advance,

entry.title: A material is extended to new plant and storage location but it is redirecting to free freight
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My client have extend a "xyz" material to 1800 and 2000 plant & storage location. Before this item is used as free shipment or with no frieght but after extending it new plant they want to charge freight for that item. But it is still picking free freight for every order they make, even in ecom it is showing as 0$ for all freight.

Every order defaults to FF free freight in  customer group 1 in additional data header details. I have tried to maintain condition record with this combination but this is affecting other ecom orders, so i have deleted this condition record. 

IF only the order default to PPA Prepaid & add in customer group1 in additonal data, then i can maintain the condition record and i feel it will work. where can i look for this setting and please feel free to suggest your solution.

Note: Customer is one time customer in ECom.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sales order creation - SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, our client wants to have prerequisite at the time of sales order creation where certain customers are allowed to create sales orders with order quantity in multiple of half/full pallets only. This check should be active only for certain customer and not all customers. 

Ex - Product XYZ has base unit of PC and sales unit of PAL where 1 PAL = 24 PC.

If a customer sends in an EDI order for 15 PC, the EDI message should error out and a failure notification should be sent to a business user whereas, if the same customer sends in an EDI order for 48 PC, system should allow sales order creation as 48 is a multiple of 24 (2 x 24 = 48). 

 

Is there a solution available in SAP S4 Public Cloud to fulfil this requirement?

entry.title: ATP check at Sales Contract
entry.content:
Hello,

Can we have the ATP check at Sales Contract and then have the subsequent order consume the same?

Example how the Sales Order gets replaced with the Outbound delivery in MD04 , is the same thing possible with Sales Contract as well.

Desired Scenario:

Create Sales Contract --> Sales Contract Appears in MD04 --> Sales Order Created with Reference to Contract --> Order gets replaced in MD04.

Thanks,

P

entry.title: How to manage "active" subcontracting in public cloud
entry.content:
We need to manage the subcontracting scenario where the customer send us some material and we perform some activities via production order. The material is then sent back to the customer and the customer is billed for the activities performed. 

The material sent by the customer does not have to have an impact on our stock valuation, since it is not ours.

It is not possible to manage via service and repair process due to the volume of serial numbers to manage.

How can we do so?

entry.title: How to handle Purchase Orders and Sales Orders with Old Material Numbers?
entry.content:
We are in the process of replacing around 9000 Materials with New Material Codes (This is done to activate Automatic Batch Split Valuation). Old Material Numbers will be maintained in MARA-BISMT. Stock will be moved to new material code. I have a few questions regarding this.

1. Should existing Purchase Orders and Sales Orders be closed before I do this activity? Or is there a way to use the new material codes to do goods receipt for existing POs and deliveries for existing SOs?

2. How do I handle sales return of older sales orders?
